signals.subtitle: Production signals cross-referenced with the Knowledge Base and agents.
signals.notConnectedHint: Connect it in Integrations to see errors, incidents and logs here.
signals.emptyHint: No recent errors or incidents found.

detail.noSummary: No textual summary available from the provider.

automations.title: {name} automations
automations.subtitle: Watch production, cross-reference the Knowledge Base and open a fix plan.
automations.connectFirst: Connect {name} in Integrations before creating automations.
automations.rulesEmpty: No rules yet. Create an automation to monitor new signals.
automations.runsEmpty: No runs yet. When a rule acts, it shows up here.
automations.editorHint: Each rule watches new {name} signals, avoids duplication and can propose in the Inbox or open an analysis automatically.
automations.name: Name
automations.deleteConfirmBody: This automation will stop watching new signals. This can't be undone.

card.newRelicDescription: Errors, logs and signals via NerdGraph/NRQL.
card.betterStackDescription: Incidents, uptime and logs for agent investigation.
card.newRelicHint: Use a New Relic User API key and account ID. Orkestral queries NerdGraph with NRQL.
card.betterStackHint: Use a Better Stack Uptime API token. Logs are optional through ClickHouse HTTP credentials.
